scripts.dev:basic: pnpm prepare:edition:basic && cross-env TRINK_EDITION=basic VITE_TRINK_EDITION=basic pnpm tauri dev
scripts.dev:trading: pnpm prepare:edition:trading && cross-env TRINK_EDITION=trading VITE_TRINK_EDITION=trading pnpm tauri dev
scripts.build:basic: pnpm prepare:edition:basic && cross-env TRINK_EDITION=basic VITE_TRINK_EDITION=basic pnpm build
scripts.build:trading: pnpm prepare:edition:trading && cross-env TRINK_EDITION=trading VITE_TRINK_EDITION=trading pnpm build
scripts.tauri:build:basic: pnpm prepare:edition:basic && cross-env TRINK_EDITION=basic VITE_TRINK_EDITION=basic pnpm tauri build --debug
scripts.tauri:build:trading: pnpm prepare:edition:trading && cross-env TRINK_EDITION=trading VITE_TRINK_EDITION=trading pnpm tauri build --debug
scripts.release:basic: pnpm prepare:edition:basic && cross-env TRINK_EDITION=basic VITE_TRINK_EDITION=basic powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-release.ps1 -Edition basic
scripts.release:trading: pnpm prepare:edition:trading && cross-env TRINK_EDITION=trading VITE_TRINK_EDITION=trading powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-release.ps1 -Edition trading
scripts.signing:check: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Write-Output 'TRInk beta builds are unsigned. Review docs/SIGNING.md for the production signing checklist.'"
